"D:\CLion 2025.3\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\ProyectoProgra2_IanSmith_Ale_.dir/objects.a
"D:\CLion 2025.3\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\ProyectoProgra2_IanSmith_Ale_.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\ProyectoProgra2_IanSmith_Ale_.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\CLion 2025.3\bin\mingw\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\ProyectoProgra2_IanSmith_Ale_.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ProyectoProgra2_IanSmith_Ale_.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libProyectoProgra2_IanSmith_Ale_.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\ProyectoProgra2_IanSmith_Ale_.dir\linkLibs.rsp
